prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（含物理类）最低位次分别为约938名→807名→869名→870名→1208名，整体呈波动上升趋势，2025年较2024年后移约338名，基准位次约1208名。\ n该校在青海省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年18人、2022年18人、2023年23人、2024年18人、2025年18人；2026年计划19人，较2025年小幅扩招1人，扩招 幅度约5.6%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第32名，近年排名稳定在25–32名区间，属于国内顶尖工科强校。\ n2026年高考周期声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要因校内偷拍事件引发34条负面舆情，可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制作用；抖音热度排名第87位（一般） ，短视频曝光量较低，整体关注度一般；历史未见明显投档断档记录；轻工技术与工程A+、化学工程与技术A、材料科学与工程A、环境科学与工程A、食品科学 与工程A、建筑学A-、控制科学与工程A-、机械工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共9个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程 及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校优势工科方向高度契合，对高分考生有较强吸引力；青海省2026年考生总数约48000人（含不确定标记），较2025年约47669人略有增 加，竞争基本持平；华南理工大学位于广东广州，属跨省招生，在青海省招生占比极低（约0.4%），地域偏好影响有限。 综合历年位次波动上行趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（竞争略加剧）、声誉负面事件可能抑制部分报考热情、但学校顶尖工科实力与热门专业热度形成对冲，在20 25年基准1208名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约1263名，区间1073–1453名。

- 信息工程

- 工科试验班（卓越人才班）（电气/软件/电子科学等）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 938 → 807 → 869 → 870 → 1208, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend. In 2025, the ranking shifted back by about 338 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 1208.\ nThe university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Qinghai Province: 18 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 18 in 2024, 18 in 2025; 19 planned for 2026, a slight increase of 1 compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 5.6%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 32nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 25–32 range in recent years, making it a top domestic engineering powerhouse.\ nIn the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative,' mainly due to 34 negative public opinions triggered by a peeping incident on campus, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 87th (average), with low short video exposure and overall attention; no obvious historical records of admission gaps; Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Food Science and Engineering A, Architecture A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, with a total of 9 A- and above disciplines, highlighting strong engineering capabilities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended with high social popularity, closely aligning with the university's advantageous engineering directions, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates; the total number of candidates in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000 (including uncertain markers), slightly increasing from about 47,669 in 2025, with competition basically flat; South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a cross-province enrollment, with a very low enrollment proportion in Qinghai Province (about 0.4%), so regional preference has limited impact. Considering the fluctuating upward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (slightly intensified competition), the possible suppression of some application enthusiasm due to negative reputation events, but the university's top engineering strength and popular major popularity forming a hedge, based on the 2025 baseline of 1208, the ranking is expected to continue shifting back; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1263, with a range of 1073–1453.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Network Engineering, Information Security)
- Information Engineering
- Engineering Experimental Class (Academician Special Class) (Mechanical/Materials/Architecture/Intelligent Construction)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellent Talent Class) (Electrical/Software/Electronic Science, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Equipment and Advanced Manufacturing) (Mechanical Engineering, Intelligent Vehicle Engineering, etc.)
- Electronic Science and Technology
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI Advanced Technology Top Class)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Transportation and Digital Construction) (Smart Transportation, Civil Engineering, etc.)
- Food Science and Engineering (Enrolled from 2021 to 2024, not listed in 2026)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1073–1453, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (Intelligent Equipment and Advanced Manufacturing, AI Advanced Technology Top Class) as the main direction, with Tier 1 Computer Science, Information Engineering, and Academician Special Class as sprint targets, and Tier 3 Intelligent Transportation and Digital Construction as a safety option. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1073), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 新闻传播学类社会热度「明显劝退」 （张雪峰效应持续），工商管理类「分化观望」，经济学类「分化观望」，文科专业整体热度偏低；青海省2026年考生总数约48000人，按近年历史类占比约36%估算，历史类考生 约17300人，较2025年17212人基本持平；华南理工大学位于广东广州，跨省招生，在青海省文科招生占比极小，地域偏好 影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动较大、2026年计划扩招（竞争略有缓解）、声誉负面事件可能抑制报考热情、但文科专业社会热度整体偏低形成下行压力，在2025 年基准767名基础上预计位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约835名，区间710–960名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (including history category) were approximately 473 → 585 → 537 → 1224 → 767, with significant fluctuations. In 2024, there was an abnormal drop (1224), rebounding to 767 in 2025, with a baseline ranking of about 767. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Qinghai Province: 8 students each year from 2021 to 2025; in 2026, the plan is 9 students, an increase of 1 student compared to 2025, an expansion rate of 12.5%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly due to a campus voyeurism incident that triggered significant negative public opinion, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 87th (average), with overall low attention. South China University of Technology is strong in engineering, with limited evaluation data for liberal arts disciplines. Business Administration corresponds to Management Science and Engineering A-, Economics corresponds to Applied Economics without separate rating, and Journalism and Communication has no separate rating. It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 32nd, with strong comprehensive strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Journalism and Communication has a social popularity of 'clearly discouraged' (Zhang Xuefeng effect continues), Business Administration is 'divided and wait-and-see', Economics is 'divided and wait-and-see', and liberal arts majors overall have low popularity. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Qinghai Province is about 48,000, with the history category accounting for approximately 36% in recent years, so history category examinees are about 17,300, basically unchanged from 17,212 in 2025. South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, recruiting across provinces, with a very small proportion of liberal arts enrollment in Qinghai, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the large fluctuations in historical rankings, the planned enrollment expansion in 2026 (slightly easing competition), the negative reputation incident that may suppress application enthusiasm, but the overall low social popularity of liberal arts majors creating downward pressure, based on the 2025 baseline of 767, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 835, with a range of 710–960.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Journalism and Communication (Journalism, Communication, Advertising)
- Economics (Economics, Finance).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Financial Management)
- Accounting (new enrollment major in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Business English (enrolled in 2024, not listed in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 710–960, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Business Administration and Accounting as the main direction, with Tier 1 Journalism and Communication and Economics as a sprint (note that Journalism and Communication has a clearly discouraged social popularity), and Tier 3 Administrative Management as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<710), you can focus on sprinting for Economics.
